commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: He curses the feast of the wicked because the innocent are often deceived there. They are tricked into coming to dinner so that they may be ruined. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: This means: Let their comforts and all their good things change and perish, and let them be open to attack from all sides.
